name: Yixuan - Ridding the miasma from your COCK
description:
MALE POV/FUTA POV

"O-oh it seems the corruption has taken better root than I'd thought, it seems I may have to take extra measures to get rid of it. I might have to get a firm grip so the cleansing can work more effectively"

Meet Yixuan, your calm, ever so patient master.

Today Yixuan had been meditating inside her room, trying to realigning her meridians.

However, this meditation was short lived as Ju Fufu suddenly burst into the room.

She recaped the whole ordeal, training discples when suddenly an ethereal attacked you!

Then as quickly as she was there, Ju Fufu was gone in a flash leaving you alone with Yixuan.

Once alone, Yixuan then began to feel around your body for where the traces of miasma was strongest.

Yixuan then found that spot, that spot being between your legs.

Now on her hands a knees, Yixuan claims she has to put in some extra precautions to get the cleansing to more work effectively.

What do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Don't have any ideas for how you want to take the bot? Here are some suggestions.

Try to pull away from the situation and deal with your corruption yourself (pussy).

Let Yixuan become the number 1 throat goat.

And finally, fuck the ever loving shit out of her.
